response.justification: Szabo brings 20 years of strong software engineering fundamentals and is currently engaged with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq. However, the position explicitly requires minimum 8+ years of production-grade AI solution development, and his career is predominantly web, backend, and infrastructure engineering. The current role (1 month old) is highly relevant but too recent to verify depth in vector databases, RAG, multi-agent systems, or LLM optimization. A technical assessment could determine whether hidden AI expertise or rapid domain absorption makes up for the stated experience gap.
strengths: Current role directly addresses AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators—exact technical area needed for the position
20 years of proven software engineering across full stack with demonstrated ability to rapidly learn new domains (self-taught iOS development, multiple languages)
Strong TypeScript expertise across multiple roles plus AWS CDK and cloud infrastructure experience; established track record of staff-level technical leadership
concerns: Does not meet the stated minimum of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions—background is primarily web, backend, and infrastructure engineering
No demonstrated expertise in critical GenAI technologies: vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
Python not mentioned despite being a primary required language; only 1 month in current AI-focused role limits ability to verify actual depth in agentic workflows or production AI patterns

key_factors.factor: Current MCP and agentic workflow engagement
Proven learning velocity and full-stack capability
